Where this starts
From Zomato, District has evolved.

A decade of serving the UAE's restaurants showed us where the old model fell short for premium operators: discount-led, delivery-led, built for everyone. So we listened, found the gaps, and built a separate app from the ground up.

District is the one-stop app for everything going out, dining, events, concerts, attractions and activities, where each vertical feeds the next. For an integrated resort, that is not a feature. It is the whole point.

The pull only a one-stop app has

Dining, events, attractions and activities. One app for every guest.

We ticket the resort's concerts and sport events, and its activities, the shooting range and club, golf, watersports, on the same app guests use to dine. A guest who books the range or a show is one nudge from Kinara, Sette or Jeema. Every vertical sells the next, and at a resort the spend stays in-house.

What we offer

Your full toolkit on District.

Every tool below is included from day one, across every venue in the resort.

🎟️
Dining Experiences (Packages)

A complete, pre-paid evening sold as one ticket. Package a Kinara tasting with pairings, a Sette rooftop dinner, an OIA Santorini brunch, and sell it in full, upfront, through the District app. Guests pay before they arrive, so the sale is locked in. No refunds, guaranteed revenue per seat, per night, across every venue in the group.

SIGNATURE TOOL
⏱️
Pre-Book Discounts

A different tool, and a precise one. A pre-book discount is limited by time and by seats: you set exactly when it runs and how many covers can claim it. A Tuesday lunch, twenty seats at Jeema, your quietest window only. It lets you align District with your own business strategy, filling the gaps you choose and protecting the services you do not.

TIME & SLOT-LIMITED
🎭
Events & Activities Ticketing

The capability only a one-stop app has. We ticket the resort's concerts and sport events, and its activities, the shooting range and club, golf, watersports, on the same app guests use to dine. A guest who books the range or a show is one nudge from your restaurants. Every vertical sells the next, and the spend stays in-house.

RESORT-WIDE
🔍
Search & Discovery

Every venue is live and searchable across the platform by cuisine, occasion, vibe and location. A member searching "beach dining Jebel Ali" or "Hatta restaurant" finds your outlets organically. Each page is fully in your control: photos, menus, event schedules and real-time availability.

ALWAYS ON
📅
Table Reservation Management

Seamless in-app reservations across all six hotels, managed from one partner dashboard in real time. Full visibility on covers, timing and party size. For a resort running dozens of services a night, having every booking consolidated in one place is operationally significant.

CORE FEATURE
💳
District Pay & QuickPay QR

Guests settle the bill through the app or a table QR code, no app required on their end. Saves 10 to 15 minutes per table, per turn. Bank-partner offers (Emirates NBD, FAB, HSBC and more) layer on top to lift spend per bill, and it integrates with your POS directly.

FRICTIONLESS
♾️
District Loop, Repeat Guest Engine

After each visit paid through the QR flow, guests instantly unlock an offer redeemable only at your venue, a cocktail upgrade, a return-night discount, a priority booking. Push notifications draw them back as it nears expiry. You define the offer. Guests who experience the resort once are incentivised to return, and to bring others.

RETENTION
📣
In-App Marketing & Mobile Billboards

Premium, top-of-app placement: the Dining Edit, Mobile Billboards covering an 8 to 10km radius of the subzone you choose, Visit Packs and Impression Packs. Place a JA venue first in front of members already deciding where their evening goes.

VISIBILITY
🎬
Vibes (Short-Form Content)

Short videos surfaced on the District front page to members near your venues. A resort's content, beach sunsets, chef's tables, the shooting range, performs exactly here. Upload every 30 days and the algorithm treats each as fresh. Included free as a partner.

INCLUDED FREE
🔔
Push Notifications & WhatsApp

Targeted messages to members near Jebel Ali, JBR and Hatta, promoting your events, experience packages and expiring Loop rewards. Delivered to people actively planning a night out, by location and intent. High-intent audience, low noise.

TARGETED
📊
Partner Dashboard & Insights

A full view of every outlet's performance: billed amount, revenue, walk-in versus pre-book, covers, booking patterns and package redemptions, consolidated across all six hotels. Any member of your team can access it, and a dedicated account manager reviews it with you monthly.

ALWAYS AVAILABLE

We handle the “how.” You just tell us “when.”
Why this matters
A resort this dynamic deserves to be discovered, again and again.
JA has something for every person who steps onto the property. District gives that range the visibility it deserves, in front of the tourist passing through, and above all in front of the members who become regulars once they discover everything JA has to offer.
